description_long: This is a single-story suburban house surrounded by a white fence and mature trees, with a paved driveway and a small front yard. The structure features a flat roof and a modern, open-plan layout visible through large windows and sliding glass doors. The exterior is primarily white with some wooden accents, and the house includes a patio area with outdoor furniture. The landscaping is well-maintained, with green lawns, shrubs, and a mix of deciduous and coniferous trees providing shade and privacy. The main entrance is accessible from the driveway, and the property is bordered by a sidewalk, suggesting an urban or suburban neighborhood setting. The overall design is clean and contemporary, emphasizing functionality and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, large windows, and a fenced yard with mature trees and a patio area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and a clear view of the patio and front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the fenced yard, and the arrangement of trees and lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio area, large windows, and backyard space with additional greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the fence, driveway, and the dense tree coverage along the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, small paved approach, and no porch or overhang, integrated into the front facade.
